ddls:
CREATE TABLE "funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund */,
  "fund_name" TEXT /* Name of the fund */,
  "fund_manager" TEXT /* Name of the fund manager */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the fund manager */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the fund was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Fund description and objectives */,
  "investment_strategy" TEXT /* Fund investment strategy (e.g., growth, income, index) */,
  "target_return" REAL /* Target return percentage for the fund */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., portfolio manager, analyst, compliance officer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fund */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Whether the user can view the fund */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Whether the user can edit the fund */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Whether the user can delete the fund */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the trade in the portfolio */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fund where the trade occurred */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the trade (buy or sell) */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the trade date */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the trade (shares * close_price) */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., market order, limit order) */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order that triggered the trade */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Time of trade execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares ordered */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the order (buy or sell) */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., market order, limit order) */,
  "limit_price" REAL /* Limit price for limit orders */,
  "stop_loss" REAL /* Stop-loss price for stop-loss orders */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, executed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price entry */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend entry */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "declaration_date" TEXT /* Date the dividend was declared */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date of record for the dividend */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the dividend was paid */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend per share */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id")
)
